title.rendered: [Free Mini Webinar] How Nonprofit Professionals Can AI-Proof Their Careers

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, June 24, 2026
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (30 Minutes)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Heather Mansfield, Founder of Nonprofit Tech for Good

Early adopter marketing and fundraising professionals are experimenting with generative AI, but as we speed towards achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), working with predictive and agentic AI are also must-have skills of the future.

Join this free 30-minute webinar to become AI-literate in the concepts most immediately to impact your career so you can start the process of upskilling now and thrive in your career for years to come.

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.

excerpt.rendered: Join this free 20-minute webinar to become AI-literate in the concepts most immediately to impact your career so you can start the process of upskilling now and thrive in your career for years to come.
